description_long: This is a classic lounge swivel chair with a matching ottoman, featuring a mid-century modern design reminiscent of the Eames Lounge Chair. The chair and ottoman are upholstered in distressed brown leather, giving them a vintage, worn-in appearance. The seat, backrest, and armrests are generously padded, with the backrest and seat shell encased in a curved wooden veneer. The chair sits atop a black, five-pointed metal base with glides, while the ottoman has a similar four-pointed base. The armrests are integrated into the seat structure and are also padded with leather. The rear of the chair reveals two black metal support struts connecting the backrest to the seat, emphasizing its sturdy construction.
description: A vintage-style brown leather swivel lounge chair with a matching ottoman, featuring a curved wooden shell and black metal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded leather seat, backrest, armrests, and ottoman, with the chair's inviting, ergonomic shape clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's reclined angle, thick cushioning, curved wooden shell, and the matching ottoman's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved wooden back, two black metal support struts, and the black metal base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest profile, the seat's ergonomic contour, and the ottoman's matching design.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, cylindrical metal column branching into a five-pointed star base, fixed and sturdy, supporting the seat.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, rectangular, and gently curved backrest with thick brown leather upholstery and a wooden veneer shell, supported by two black metal struts.
attribute_armrest_style: Padded, leather-covered armrests integrated into the seat structure, with a curved wooden shell and attached at both ends to the seat and backrest.
